titleStmt.title: SII 18.122: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 122. (B.K. No. 8 of 1933-34.) BAṄKĀPUR, BAṄKĀPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Left pillar at the entrance into the central shrine of the Nagarēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 45, Subhakṛit, Pushya ba. Amāvāsyā, Sunday, Saṁkrānti, solar eclipse. The date is irregular. On the tithi cited, which corresponds to A.D. 1122, December 30, the week-day was Saturday, not Sunday; nor was there an eclipse or Saṁkrānti on that day.

It records the grant of land made by Holli-gāvuṇḍa and others for the feeding of ascetics in the temple of Nagarēśvaradēva at Baṅkāpura. The gift was entrusted to Chandrabhūshaṇa-Paṇḍitadēva, the āchārya of the temple. The king's subordinate Tailadēva is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © © © svasti sama
stabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājā
dhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvana
malladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi
pravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta
mire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . beḷasellaṁ kuṁdaveṁ
duṁ pusi pasavu baṟaṁ māri mikkirddini vyākuḷadiṁdaṁ
keṭṭavellā praje dhanakanakādhiṣṭhita(ṁ) rssōbhanaṁ nā
ḍoḷagellaṁ taṁna rājyōdayadoḍenisidī rājasarvvaṁ
nyaniṁnā naḷanō māṁdhātanō rāmanō nriganō ha
riścaṁdranō trailadēvanu . © vinayāṁbhōnidhi śiṣṭa
vaṁśatiḷakaṁ vidvapriyaṁ bhāratīstanahāraṁ sujanapra
saṁnavinutāḷaṁkāranatyuṁnataṁ manumārggaṁ pari
tuṣṭapuṣṭivibhavaṁ saundaryyadiṁdeyde mēdini baṁṇnippu
du mādiyaṁ parahitavyāpāda saṁpāReadra.
diya © © Intenisi negaḷda mādigavuṁḍana putra
holligāvuṁḍanuṁ . sēnabōva bhāskarayyanuṁ . śiva
rāsipaṁḍitaruṁ . dharmmada basavaṁṇanuṁ . Ālavaḷḷigēta . kōū
rakaggaṁṇa . koṟadihaḷḷa (.) kaḍale bākaṇṇa (.) ninibaru sahitavā
girddu dharmmōtsāhacittarāgi śrīmatu baṁkāpurada naga
rēsvaradēvarācāryya caṁdrabhūṣaṇapaṁḍitadēvara kare
du Aḷliya tapōdhanarāhārakkaṁ cāḷukyavikrama
varṣada 45 neya śubhakritu saṁvatsarada pusya bahuḷada
mavāse Ādityavāra vyatīpāta saṁkrāṁnti sūryya
grahaṇadaṁdu seṁbūra teṁkaṇa bilagakeṟeya keḷage
gadde kaṁma 60 maṁ nadaṟa baḷiya maneymaṁ caṁdrabhūśaṇa
paṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa
ru . © Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaru gaṁge kurukṣētra
vāraṇāsiyargghyatīrtthadalli sahaśra kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagu
maṁ paṁcaratunadalu kaṭṭisi sahaśra vēdapāraga brā
hmaṇarggubhayamukhigoṭṭa paḷamaku . Intidanaḷi
da(ṁ)ma vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradalli sahaśra kapileymaṁ
sahaśrabrāhmaṇarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakana
ku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaśṭhirvvarśa
ṣahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē(ḥ) krimiḥ . © © ©
Digital edition of SII 18.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
